justifications.reason: The Python binding remains a single-file compatibility facade because release packaging, source-tree imports, and ABI guard scripts currently copy or inspect python/tensorcore/__init__.py as the cohesive ctypes mirror of the public C ABI.
justifications.mitigation: Keep new native entry points covered by the FFI, constants, ABI-layout, and smoke checks, then split declarations and wrapper groups into focused modules behind the same package facade once the release wheel copy path and guard scripts consume that module boundary.
